rationale: Gov't Code §2001.032 governs legislative review of proposed state agency rules. The proposed change is a statutory amendment to a tax exemption amount, not an agency rule, so no conflict arises.
quote: Each house of the legislature by rule shall establish a process under which the presiding officer of each house refers each proposed state agency rule to the appropriate standing committee for review before the rule is adopted.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns agency rulemaking review, proposed change is direct statutory amendment.
